text:
Created attachment 146351
german/alt-aspell patch_v3 on port version v346803

This is the new version adopted to the current version (v346803) of the ports tree. (see also comment 0 and comment 2)

I am not sure whether the variables DISTVERSION, PORTREVISION and PORTEPOCH are correct now. (see also comment 2)

The log files of compilations will follow shortly.

ru,
